# VIA Labs

> Universal cross-chain infrastructure for blockchain interoperability.

VIA Labs builds the messaging layer that enables any blockchain to communicate with any other blockchain. The protocol handles message formatting, routing, delivery guarantees, and multi-layer security validation through a permissionless validator network.

## Key Pages

- https://vialabs.tech/ — Homepage
- https://vialabs.tech/overview — Platform overview and architecture
- https://vialabs.tech/use-cases — Supported use cases (token bridges, NFT transfers, cross-chain governance, etc.)

## Documentation

- https://developer.vialabs.tech/ — Developer documentation (coming soon)
